data.title: Bo Hines named CEO of Tether’s new US arm as company unveils USAT stablecoin
data.description:
Bo Hines, who led t White House Crypto Council under President Donald Trump, has been named as CEO of Tether's newly created U. S. unit.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/370472/bo-hines-named-ceo-of-tethers-new-us-arm-as-company-unveils-usat-stablecoin?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description:
According to TechFlow, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $287 million over the past 24 hours. Long positions accounted for $70.31 million, while short positions saw liquidations amounting to $217 million.

Bitcoin experienced liquidations worth $68.58 million, and Ethereum saw $65.30 million in liquidations. In total, 107,083 traders faced liquidations during this period. The largest single liquidation occurred on a centralized exchange's BTCUSDT trading pair, valued at $3.11 million.

data.title: U.S. Department of Justice Seeks Forfeiture of Funds from Iranian Citizen
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. Department of Justice has initiated a civil forfeiture lawsuit to recover $584,741 in USDT from an Iranian citizen. The individual, Mohammad Abedini, is identified as the founder of Iran's SDRA company, which reportedly provides technical support for the Iranian military drone 'Shahed.' The funds are allegedly held in a non-custodial cryptocurrency wallet, though authorities have not disclosed further details.

data.title: SOL treasury company Forward Industries has purchased 4 million SOLs and has $800 million in funds available to buy SOLs.
data.description: According to Emmett Gallic, Forward Industries, the SOL treasury, has purchased 4 million SOL tokens, valued at approximately $800 million. Two million of these tokens are held in custody at Galaxy Digital, and 1.75 million are held at Coinbase Prime Custody. According to previous announcements, Forward Industries still has $800 million in funds available for SOL purchases.

data.title: Sui Ecosystem Momentum Protocol's cumulative transaction volume exceeds US$11 billion
data.description: Data shows that Sui's native ve(3,3) DEX protocol Momentum has exceeded US$11 billion in cumulative trading volume.

The trader warns that the current chart is one “you don’t want to fade. ” Dogecoin ETF Launch In The U

data.title: Polymarket Integrates Chainlink Oracles for Price Prediction Market Settlements
data.description: Polymarket, an on-chain prediction market platform, announced the integration of Chainlink's oracle infrastructure to provide verifiable data and automate market settlement processes. Chainlink founder Sergey Nazarov stated that when market outcomes are resolved through the oracle network's high-quality data and tamper-proof computations, prediction markets will evolve into "reliable, real-time signals the world can trust." (The Block)

data.title: The initial forecast for the US one-year inflation rate in September was 4.8%, compared with the expected 4.7%.
data.description: The preliminary reading for the University of Michigan Consumer Confidence Index for September was 55.4, compared to the expected reading of 58. The preliminary reading for the one-year inflation rate for September was 4.8%, compared to the expected reading of 4.7%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Analysis: PancakeSwap's July Trading Competition Suspected of Insider Trading
data.description: PancakeSwap claimed that the winners of its July trading competition were randomly selected, but blockchain records show that approximately half of the 1,700 winning wallets belonged to a cluster of interconnected wallets. The competition, PancakeSwap's second such event, saw investors earn points by trading five Binance Alpha project tokens: League of Traders (LOT), Bedrock DAO (BR), MilkyWay (MILK), NodeOps (NODE), and Moonveil (MORE). The total prize pool for the competition was worth $250,000. A Cointelegraph investigation found that at least 850 winning wallets were funded by other winning wallets, which transferred BNB to each other for wash trading to meet the threshold. A League of Traders representative stated that these wallets were directly connected and all selected, with the probability of this happening consecutively close to zero. The prize distribution was unfair, and the winners appeared to be "humanly selected" rather than randomly selected. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Most US crypto treasury companies opened higher, with SOL treasury company FORD leading the gains with a 15% gain.
data.description: According to MyStonks data, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.18% to 46,033 points; the S&P 500 fell 0.03% to 6,585 points; and the Nasdaq Composite Index rose 0.1% to 22,068 points. Most crypto treasury companies rose. Forward Industries Inc. (FORD), a SOL treasury company, opened up 15.23% to $39.73; Sol Strategies Inc. (STKE), opened up 3.72% to $7.04; MicroStrategy Incorporated (MSTR), a Bitcoin treasury company, opened up 1.02%; and Bitmine Immersion Technologies Inc. (BMNR), an Ethereum treasury company, opened up 1.91%. It is reported that MyStonks is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has launched hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF token targets such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

On-chain data compiled by Arkham Intelligence shows the firm has made a total buy […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/galaxy-accumulates-1-81m-sol-in-24-hours/

data.title: IREN Co-Founders Sell Shares Amid Stock Surge
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the co-founders and co-CEOs of Bitcoin mining company IREN, the Roberts brothers, have sold one million shares each as the company's stock price reached a new high of $33. This sale resulted in a total cash-out of $66 million.

Following this transaction, each brother retains approximately 13.99 million shares, representing about 6% of IREN's issued shares. This marks their second significant share sale in two years, with the previous sale occurring in December 2023 when the stock price was around $5.

data.title: Pendle Launches Cross-Chain PT on Avalanche
data.description: According to Foresight News, Pendle has announced the launch of its cross-chain PT, with the first being Ethena Labs' PT-USDe for November 2025. This cross-chain PT is now available on Avalanche. Silo Labs and Term Labs have accepted this PT as a collateral asset. The cross-chain integration was completed with the support of LayerZero.

data.description:
Key Insights: The U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is under pressure again. This time, it’s not for suing crypto companies

data.title: Figure's Stock Surges on Second Day of Trading
data.description: According to Foresight News, blockchain lending platform Figure (FIGR.US) experienced a significant increase in its stock price on its second day of trading. The stock rose by over 14% during intraday trading, following a more than 24% gain on its debut. Currently, the stock is priced at $35.69.

data.title: Gemini Co-founder: Bitcoin is Gold 2.0 and will reach $1 million in the next decade
data.description: Gemini co-founder Tyler Winklevoss said in an interview with CNBC that Bitcoin is basically still at the bottom of the first inning, because we believe that if Bitcoin can subvert the gold market, the trading price of each Bitcoin will reach 1 million US dollars. We believe that Bitcoin is gold version 2.0.

data.title: XDOG, the X Layer ecosystem meme token, surpassed $0.025, with a 24-hour increase of 77.2%.
data.description: Market data shows that XDOG, the meme coin of the X Layer ecosystem, briefly broke through $0.025 and is currently trading at $0.02725, a new all-time high and a 24-hour increase of 77.2%, bringing its market capitalization to $19.4341 million. Earlier, OKX founder and CEO Star stated on the X platform that he does not believe MEME is a bad idea, but rather embodies the spirit of the crypto community, but will not support scam-like MEMEs. Odaily reminds users that the price of MEME is highly volatile, so investors should exercise caution when participating.
